verdict: Buy XEQT.TO at $44.86 CAD. Core is 10.7% vs 40% target — $1,872 to go. Fund first, every deposit.
Cap breaches: CEG, OSS. Do not add — shrink by dilution.
Theme concentration at 89.2%. Building XEQT core is the fix.
Skip: MSFT above no-chase; PLTR above no-chase.

SOFI: only $2.48 CAD room to cap — too small for a meaningful buy.
